name: Basic coverage verification with orphans
prompt: Verify curriculum coverage for Lengua y Literatura 5to grado. The Matriz A&S contains 12 destrezas (DZ-LENG-5-01 through DZ-LENG-5-12). The units folder has 4 units. Unit 1 covers DZ-LENG-5-01, 02, 03. Unit 2 covers DZ-LENG-5-04, 05, 06. Unit 3 covers DZ-LENG-5-07, 08, 09. Unit 4 covers DZ-LENG-5-10, 11. Produce the coverage dashboard.
expected_behavior: Identifies DZ-LENG-5-12 as orphaned with CRITICAL severity
Generates a coverage map table with all 12 destrezas
Flags that 100% coverage is NOT met — Gate G1 cannot pass
Recommends remediation: assign DZ-LENG-5-12 to a unit

name: Malformed DZ-ref tag detection
prompt: Verify coverage for Matematicas 6to grado. During scanning, you find these tags: [REF: DZ-MAT-6-01], [REF: DZ-MAT-6-02], [REF: DZ-MAT-6-3], [REF: DZ MAT-6-04], [REF: DZ-MAT-6-05]. The Matriz lists 5 destrezas. Report coverage status.
expected_behavior: Flags [REF: DZ-MAT-6-3] as malformed (missing zero-padding) with WARNING
Flags [REF: DZ MAT-6-04] as malformed (missing colon after DZ) with WARNING
Reports only 3 valid DZ-ref tags found (01, 02, 05)
Lists DZ-MAT-6-03 and DZ-MAT-6-04 as effectively orphaned due to malformed tags
Recommends fixing the malformed tags before re-running coverage verification

name: Over-coverage and inserciones verification
prompt: Verify coverage for Ciencias Naturales 5to grado. All 8 destrezas are covered. However, DZ-CCNN-5-03 appears in 6 different activities across 4 units. Also check whether the unit set includes educacion ambiental content as required by MinEduc inserciones curriculares.
expected_behavior: Flags DZ-CCNN-5-03 as OVER-COVERED (6 activities) with recommendation to review for redundancy
Checks for educacion ambiental insercion and reports presence or absence
Includes inserciones curriculares table in the dashboard
Notes that Gate G1 coverage criterion is met but over-coverage warrants review
